mapper.select:
SELECT T.TRAVEL_NO, T.TRAVEL_TITLE, T.STATUS, T.CREATE_DATE, T.MODIFY_DATE, T.COUNT, T.MEMBER_NO, T.SCHEDULE_NO, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NICE N WHERE N.POST_NO = T.TRAVEL_NO) AS LIKE_COUNT FROM TRAVEL_LIST T WHERE T.STATUS = 'Y' AND ( T.VISIBILITY = 'PUBLIC' OR (T.VISIBILITY = 'MEMBER' AND #{loginUserNo} IS NOT NULL) )
AND T.TRAVEL_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND T.REGION = #{region}
ORDER BY T.TRAVEL_NO DESC OFFSET (#{pi.currentPage} - 1) * #{pi.boardLimit} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pi.boardLimit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_TRAVEL_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TRAVEL_LIST ( TRAVEL_NO, TRAVEL_TITLE, STATUS, CREATE_DATE, MEMBER_NO ) VALUES ( #{travelNo}, #{travelTitle}, 'Y', SYSDATE, #{memberNo} )

SELECT SEQ_TRAVEL_SUB_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TRAVEL_LIST_SUB (TRAVEL_SUB_NO, TRAVEL_SUB_CONTENT, TRAVEL_SUB_SEQ, TRAVEL_SUB_DATE, TRAVEL_NO, CONTENT_ID, RATING) VALUES (#{travelSubNo}, #{travelSubContent}, #{travelSubSeq}, SYSDATE, #{travelNo}, #{contentId}, #{rating})
INSERT INTO TB_IMAGE (IMAGE_NO, IMAGE_PATH, FILE_NAME, RENAME_FILE, TRAVEL_SUB_NO) VALUES (SEQ_IMAGE_NO.NEXTVAL, #{imagePath}, #{fileName}, #{renameFile}, #{travelSubNo})
mapper.select: SELECT TRAVEL_NO, TRAVEL_TITLE, CREATE_DATE, COUNT, REGION, MEMBER_NO FROM TRAVEL_LIST WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY TRAVEL_NO DESC
